Kalayaan 5 Wind Energy Project             Wind                 Viento Energy 3 Corp.                      Famy, Siniloan, Pakil, and Pangil, Laguna; and Real, Quezon           Laguna & Quezon    IV-A        88.000               Apr-28              Jun-28

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        This transmission line route will traverse the municipalities of
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Calabanga, Bombon, Magarao, and Naga City, covering mostly private
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        agricultural lands that are under the agrarian reform program and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        have already been awarded to farmer beneficiaries. The lands with
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EPs and CLOAs will be affected by our transmission line route.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Concerns whether there is a need for the land conversion and the
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        mode to acquire rights of way;
San Miguel Bay Wind Power Project          Wind               ACX3 Capital Holdings Inc.                                   Offshore of Camarines Sur                              Camarines Sur      V          500.000             Dec-27               Jun-28
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        NGCP has proposed relocating the project’s connection to the 500 kV
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Naga Substation (over the 14 February 2025 meeting, no official
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        communication received).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Concerns and Implications to SMB WPP Project - This would require
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ACX3 to restart the entire process of securing NGCP permits and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        would disregard over two (2) years of land investigation and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        preparation for a 230 kV interconnection/ transmission line

                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Installed/ Rated   Target Testing and   Target Commercial   Remarks / Issues Encountered
Name of the Project                          Plant Type                Company Name                                                     Location                                         Province           Region
                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Capacity (MW)       Commissioning          Operation       During Project Development


                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Direct connection to NGCP’s Proposed Naga 500 kV Substation

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     - DOE & NGCP Meeting on 13 February 2025 at DOE to clarify the
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     following CIP statement (thru letter dated 31 January 2025 to the
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     DOE):
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     1. Re-Filing of the Luzon-Visayas HVDC Upgrade Project. As a
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     background, NGCP has a pending application for the approval of its
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     5th Regulatory Reset with the Energy Regulatory Commission (“ERC”)
                                                                                                                                                                                    Camarines Sur &                                                                                  which includes the approval for the upgrade of the Luzon-Visayas
San Miguel Bay Offshore Wind Power Project     Wind                   CI NMF (PH) Corp.                             Provinces of Camarines Norte and Camarines Sur                                             V            1000.000             Mar-28               Jun-28
                                                                                                                                                                                    Camarines Norte                                                                                  HVDC Bipolar Operation Project. NGCP commits to re-file a separate
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     application for the provisional approval of the upgrade of the Luzon-
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Visayas HVDC Bipolar Operation Project, which includes the Naga
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Substation Project as one of its components. NGCP deems that the
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     re-filing of the application for the provisional approval should not be
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     isolated to the Naga Substation Project as the Certificate of Energy
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Project of National Significance was issued for the entire Luzon-
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Visayas HVDC Upgrade Project. We understand that NGCP will re-file
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     the said application for the
Romblon Wind Power Project                     Wind           Romblon Electric Cooperative, Inc.                                  Romblon, Romblon                                       Romblon             IV-B             0.900              Jun-28               Aug-28         -

San Juan Wind Power Project                    Wind               SE Renewable Energy Inc.                                  San Juan and Rosario, Batangas                              Batangas             IV-A             96.000             Dec-28               Mar-29
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     The proposed 230 kV transmission line for the San Miguel Bay Wind
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Power Project will pass through Calabanga, Bombon, Magarao, and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Naga City. During the land investigation, it was found that many
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     private agricultural lands along the route are part of the agrarian
Lucena Wind Power Project                      Wind               ACX3 Capital Holdings Inc.                                Offshore and Onshore of Quezon                               Quezon              IV-A            475.000             Dec-28               Jun-29
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     reform program and have been awarded to farmer beneficiaries with
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     EPs/CLOAs. To proceed with the project, the company intends to
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     lease portions of these lands for transmission line construction to
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     facilitate power distribution in Camarines Sur.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Transmission Connection

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     20 August 2025 - Approved request to change the capacity from

Renewable Energy (RE) Projects (Geothermal, Hydro, Biomass, Solar, and Wind) are updated as of 31 December 2025
IRESS - Integrated Renewable Energy and Energy Storage System

For inquiries, please contact the following:
DOE Electric Power Industry Management Bureau (EPIMB) for non-RE projects (coal, oil, natural gas,and BESS) - doe.epimb.powerprojects@gmail.com
DOE Renewable Energy Management Bureau (REMB) for RE Projects - remb9513@doe.gov.ph
